claim: Verifier confirms: All evidence from explorer and cross-checker is factual, well-cited, and sufficient for PRD readiness. No assumptions presented as facts. All evidence paths are project-scoped and usable. Missing data and risks are explicitly documented. The demand system correctly implements boundary-audited evidence dispatch with explorer, cross-checker, and verifier protocols.

evidence.why: Core boundary control implementation verified by both explorer and cross-checker

evidence.summary: Boundary violations add BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers and set prd_ready=false
evidence.why: Acceptance criteria that boundary audit blocks PRD readiness on mutations

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() validates scope declaration and inference from path/url/source
evidence.why: Validation that assumptions are not presented as facts

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() requires repo-relative paths for project facts
evidence.why: Evidence that project-scoped evidence must cite usable paths

evidence.summary: Test verifies external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts
evidence.why: Test evidence that scope validation prevents assumption-as-fact violations

evidence.summary: Test verifies boundary blocks project mutations even when agent results pass
evidence.why: Test evidence that boundary audit enforces no-mutation constraint

risks: Boundary snapshot implementation bugs could allow undetected mutations
Provider adapter misconfiguration could grant unrestricted write access
Evidence scope validation edge cases could allow external evidence as project facts

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker evidence is verified: all claims cite project-scoped evidence with exact paths, no assumptions promoted to facts, scope validation prevents external sources as project facts, boundary audit blocks mutations, and risks/missing data are explicitly documented. Cross-checker independently confirmed all explorer findings with no conflicts. Evidence supports acceptance criteria that agents cite project paths and boundary audit blocks PRD readiness on mutations or missing evidence.
